outputs.progress: Shipped the first in-repo tool registry slice for GitHub and Linear with schemas for PR and issue tracking. Implemented registry-backed tool contracts to reduce workflow duplication. Built initial evaluation harness comparing raw LLM vs Runeflow performance.
outputs.plans: Finalize hybrid-skills roadmap focusing on host ownership, runtime semantics, and tool registry. Expand evaluation across GitHub, Linear, and mixed workflows. Add lifecycle hooks to enable host intervention without orchestration takeover.
outputs.problems: Cerebras token-per-minute quotas limit fair benchmarking between raw and Runeflow executions. Exploring smaller models or sequential runs to mitigate bias. Some tool contract redundancy remains during transition to registry-first approach.
outputs.formatted:
⚙️ Runeflow Platform (Mar 29 - Apr 4)
Progress: Shipped the first in-repo tool registry slice for GitHub and Linear with schemas for PR and issue tracking. Implemented registry-backed tool contracts to reduce workflow duplication. Built initial evaluation harness comparing raw LLM vs Runeflow performance.
Plans: Finalize hybrid-skills roadmap focusing on host ownership, runtime semantics, and tool registry. Expand evaluation across GitHub, Linear, and mixed workflows. Add lifecycle hooks to enable host intervention without orchestration takeover.
Problems: Cerebras token-per-minute quotas limit fair benchmarking between raw and Runeflow executions. Exploring smaller models or sequential runs to mitigate bias. Some tool contract redundancy remains during transition to registry-first approach.

outputs.progress: Shipped first in-repo tool registry slice for GitHub and Linear with schemas for PRs, issues, and backlogs. Implemented registry-backed tool contracts to reduce schema duplication. Built initial raw-vs-Runeflow evaluation harness for token and reliability comparison.
outputs.plans: Finalize hybrid-skills roadmap focusing on host ownership, runtime semantics, and registry priorities. Run comparative evaluations across GitHub, Linear, and mixed workflows. Add lifecycle hooks for host intervention around steps.
outputs.problems: Cerebras token-per-minute quotas disrupt fair benchmarking between raw and Runeflow skills. Need smaller models or sequential runs for valid comparisons. Tool contract redundancy remains an issue without universal registry adoption.
outputs.formatted:
⚙️ Runeflow Platform (Mar 29 - Apr 4)
Progress: Shipped first in-repo tool registry slice for GitHub and Linear with schemas for PRs, issues, and backlogs. Implemented registry-backed tool contracts to reduce schema duplication. Built initial raw-vs-Runeflow evaluation harness for token and reliability comparison.
Plans: Finalize hybrid-skills roadmap focusing on host ownership, runtime semantics, and registry priorities. Run comparative evaluations across GitHub, Linear, and mixed workflows. Add lifecycle hooks for host intervention around steps.
Problems: Cerebras token-per-minute quotas disrupt fair benchmarking between raw and Runeflow skills. Need smaller models or sequential runs for valid comparisons. Tool contract redundancy remains an issue without universal registry adoption.
